description_long: This is a compact submachine gun with a boxy, utilitarian design, reminiscent of the iconic Uzi. The main body is constructed from dark metal, featuring a prominent rectangular receiver and a short, thick barrel. A folding wire stock is attached to the rear, curving over the top and providing stability when extended. The magazine is long and protrudes vertically from the grip, which is integrated into the lower receiver. The weapon is equipped with simple iron sights and a trigger guard beneath the receiver. The overall finish is matte black, with minimal external embellishments, emphasizing function over form.
description: A compact, boxy submachine gun with a folding wire stock, long vertical magazine, and matte black finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the folding wire stock, rectangular receiver, and long magazine extending downward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, iron sights, and the narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wire stock, magazine, and the simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wire stock and the alignment of the receiver and magazine.
